⚠️ CRITICAL WARNING ⚠️

The following payload is designed to violently stress-test your hardware.

1. It will spawn infinite background workers to consume 100% of all CPU cores.
2. It will abuse WebGL Fill Rate by overdrawing 100 layers per frame.
3. It will stack CSS backdrop-filters to obliterate your GPU compositor.
4. Your browser may crash, and your system may experience thermal throttling.


F I L L R A T E D E A T H

GPU VRAM OVERFLOW IMMINENT FANS AT MAXIMUM RPM

System Failsafe

Your hardware compositor is currently experiencing catastrophic loop failure.

Root Terminal

Enter exact key to dump memory buffer.



Input polling rate severely degraded.
